response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack web/application developer (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, MongoDB) with no demonstrated background in SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, AI accelerator architecture, deep learning workload optimization, SIMD/MIMD, or GPU architecture. The role is a principal-level hardware/performance architect position requiring deep silicon and ML systems expertise that is absent from this resume.
strengths: Long, varied senior software engineering career (10+ years)
Low-level systems exposure via C/C++ at National Instruments and DLang async work at Sociomantic
Strong testing, TDD, and craftsmanship discipline
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware architecture, or accelerator experience
No deep learning training/inference optimization or GPU/SIMD/MIMD background
Education and experience profile does not match principal hardware-architect requirements

key_factors.factor: Missing AI accelerator and SoC/IP modeling expertise
No GPU/SIMD/MIMD or DNN workload optimization background
